The SIL Open Font License Version 1.1 for the Tomorrow Project Font Software.

# Purpose
The document is a license file for font software, specifically under the SIL Open Font License (OFL) Version 1.1. It outlines the permissions and conditions for using, modifying, and distributing the font software. The license allows users to freely use, study, modify, and redistribute the fonts, provided they are not sold by themselves and any derivative works do not use reserved font names without permission. The license also requires that the font software, whether modified or unmodified, must be distributed under the same license. The document includes definitions of key terms such as "Font Software," "Reserved Font Name," "Original Version," and "Modified Version," and it specifies conditions under which the license can be terminated.
# Content Summary
The document is a licensing file for a font software, which is governed by the SIL Open Font License (OFL) Version 1.1. The license allows users to use, study, modify, and redistribute the font software freely, with certain conditions. The font software cannot be sold by itself, but it can be bundled, embedded, or sold with other software. Any derivative works must not use reserved font names unless permission is granted by the copyright holder. The license requires that the font software, whether modified or unmodified, must remain under the OFL and cannot be distributed under a different license. This requirement does not apply to documents created using the font software.

Key definitions include "Font Software," which refers to the files released under this license, and "Reserved Font Name," which refers to specific names that cannot be used without permission. The license also defines "Original Version" and "Modified Version" to distinguish between the original font software and any derivatives.

The license includes conditions that must be met for the permission to remain valid. These conditions include maintaining the copyright notice and license with any distribution, not using reserved font names without permission, and not using the names of the copyright holders or authors for promotion without permission.

The license will terminate if any conditions are violated. It also includes a disclaimer stating that the font software is provided "as is" without any warranties, and the copyright holder is not liable for any damages arising from its use.
